headline: Greenland Energy (NASDAQ: GLND) Signs Halliburton Agreement for 2026 Jameson Land Drilling Campaign
summary: Partnership Secures Advanced Well Technologies and Arctic Operating ExpertiseHOUSTON, April 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- via IBN -- Greenland Energy Company (“Greenland”) (NASDAQ: GLND) today announced the signing of an agreement with Halliburton for integrated consulting services and logistical management relating to the planning, coordination, handling, and transportation of equipment, services, and goods.
